title: Communauté de communes Nièvre et Somme
summary: The Communauté de communes Nièvre et Somme is a communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Hauts-de-France région of France. It was formed on 1 January 2017 by the merger of the former Communauté de communes de l'Ouest d'Amiens and the Communauté de communes du Val de Nièvre et environs. On 1 January 2018 it lost 2 communes to the Communauté d'agglomération Amiens Métropole. It consists of 36 communes, and its seat is in Flixecourt. Its area is 314.2 km2, and its population was 27,972 in 2019.
text:
The Communauté de communes Nièvre et Somme is a communauté de communes in the Somme département and in the Hauts-de-France région of France. It was formed on 1 January 2017 by the merger of the former Communauté de communes de l'Ouest d'Amiens and the Communauté de communes du Val de Nièvre et environs. On 1 January 2018 it lost 2 communes to the Communauté d'agglomération Amiens Métropole. It consists of 36 communes, and its seat is in Flixecourt. Its area is 314.2 km2, and its population was 27,972 in 2019.
